kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: [2/3] Iniciando Frontend (HTTP Server) com VENV na raiz do projeto...
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Aguardando 15 segundos para os serviços subirem...
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Minimize Browser Window
kw.doc: Minimizes current browser window.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

test.name: Cenario de Teste 01: Cadastro de clientes

kw.name: Dado que a aplicação esta funcional
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Acesso a pagina de cadastro efetuada com sucesso!
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Então faço o preenchimento do cadastro
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Maria Isis' into text field '(//input[@id='nome'])[1]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Lopes Santos' into text field '(//input[@id='sobrenome'])[1]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Postcode
kw.doc: Randomly returns a postcode. :param formatted: True to allow formatted postcodes, else False (default True) :example formatted: '41224-212' '83992-291' '12324322' :example raw: '43920231' '34239530'

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Building Number
kw.doc: :example: '791'

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Street Name
kw.doc: :example: 'Crist Parks'

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Largo Lívia Moura' into text field '(//input[@id='logradouro'])[1]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Bairro
kw.doc: Randomly returns a bairro (neighborhood) name. The names were taken from the city of Belo Horizonte - Minas Gerais :example: 'Serra'

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Vila Das Oliveiras' into text field '(//input[@id='bairro'])[1]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: City
kw.doc: :example: 'Sashabury'

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Macedo das Pedras' into text field '(//input[@id='cidade'])[1]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Handle Alert
kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.

kw.name: Dado que estou na pagina de agendamento
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Quando escolho uma data para consulta
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.name: Cenario de Teste 03: Conferindo Banco de Dados pacientes

kw.name: Dado que acesso o banco de dados para pacientes
Acessndo o banco de dados para pacientes
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=supabase, url=https://dpugattsztlslyiudneu.supabase.co/rest/v1/, headers={'apikey': 'sb_publishable_uSrDS1XXeyM6Gdn_Wlfb2g_zVjONOcx', 'Authorization': 'Bearer sb_publishable_uSrDS1XXeyM6Gdn_Wlfb2g_zVjONOcx', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0

kw.name: GET On Session

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Nenhum paciente encontrado no banco de dados!
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Faz um GET filtrando pelo ID para confirmar a persistência.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Nenhum paciente encontrado no banco de dados!
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
